description: Official LaTeX template for abstract submissions to the II SEMAP (Mostra da Pós-Graduação na Semana de Matemática Aplicada), based on the official SBMAC templates for CNMAC. Provides Portuguese-language formatting via babel, title/author/affiliation blocks with footnote-style email contacts, a custom title command, and a standard bibliography environment, within a strict 3-page limit for submissions.
